examples: He was leaning nonchalantly against the wall.
Then the farmer nonchalantly said, "Okay, Benny, pull."
She raised her head and nonchalantly extended her hand, the palm up.
As he made his turn at first, Votto nudged Davis, who was nonchalantly standing near the bag, watching the play.
Spitzer's charges paint a startling picture of Marsh brass nonchalantly ripping off clients as if it were business as usual.
